overall.description: A first-person perspective from a ship's bridge at night, featuring navigation displays and a forward view of the vessel's bow cutting through dark waters. The footage appears to be from a naval simulation game, with a brief wave splash obscuring the windows.

agents.ego_description: navigating the vessel through calm coastal waters from the bridge, monitoring the navigation displays

entered.detail: leftmost navigation screen showing coastal chart with landmasses in green and yellow
center navigation screen showing circular radar with sweeping yellow arm
rightmost navigation screen showing blue sonar or depth readings
forward deck of the ship with metal railings and bow structure visible through the windows
dark water surface extending to the horizon with gentle wave movement
metal safety railings on the port side of the foredeck

segments.scene_description: The view from inside a ship's bridge at night, with three illuminated navigation monitors displaying map, radar, and sonar data. The vessel moves steadily forward through calm waters, with the foredeck and railings visible through the forward windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station during wave impact

events.description: large wave spray hits the forward bridge windows, creating a white water curtain that obscures the external view

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate as a wave impacts the bridge windows, temporarily blocking the forward view

entered.detail: white water splash and spray covering the bridge windows from the outside

segments.scene_description: A wave suddenly crashes against the bridge windows, splashing water across the glass and temporarily obscuring the view of the foredeck and ocean. The navigation monitors remain visible and operational above the spray.

events.description: water spray clears from the bridge windows, restoring full forward visibility

agents.ego_description: resuming normal navigation with clear visibility restored, continuing through the coastal waters

segments.scene_description: The wave spray clears from the windows, returning the view to the ship's foredeck and the dark ocean ahead. The vessel continues its steady course through the night, with the radar display continuously sweeping and the navigation monitors showing steady readings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady nocturnal voyage from a ship's bridge that is briefly interrupted by a sudden surge of seawater. It begins with a clear view through the forward windows, looking over the foredeck and railings while three illuminated navigation monitors display active radar, map, and sonar data. As the vessel pushes forward, a large wave suddenly crashes against the glass, splashing water across the windows and temporarily obscuring the dark ocean outside. The scene then shifts as the spray clears from the glass, restoring the visibility of the ship's bow and the surrounding night waters. Finally, the camera settles back into a steady forward motion, with the radar display continuing its rhythmic sweep and the monitors showing consistent readings.
